```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontColor black
skinparam classBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam classBorderColor black
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam classHeaderFontColor black
skinparam classHeaderBorderColor black
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #FFA500
skinparam stereotypeCFontColor black
skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor black
skinparam stereotypeEBackgroundColor #90EE90
skinparam stereotypeEFontColor black
skinparam stereotypeEBorderColor black
skinparam stereotypeVBackgroundColor #FFA500
skinparam stereotypeVFontColor black
skinparam stereotypeVBorderColor black
skinparam linetype ortho

package "«aggregate» ProductOrder" as PO {
    class "TotalPriceWithoutVAT" as TPWV <<C>>
    class "TotalVolume" as TV <<C>>
    class "BillingAddress" as BA <<C>>
    class "OrderItem" as OI <<E>>
    class "Status" as S <<C>>
    class "DeliveryAddress" as DA <<C>>
    class "ProductOrder" as POE <<E>>
    class "TotalPriceWithVAT" as TPW <<C>>
    class "TotalWeight" as TW <<C>>
}

package "«aggregate» AGV" as AGV {
    class "AGVStatus" as AGVS <<C>>
    class "AGVPosition" as AGVP <<C>>
    class "Model" as M <<C>>
    class "MaxVolumeCapacity" as MVC <<C>>
    class "BriefDescription" as BD <<C>>
    class "MaxWeightCapacity" as MWC <<C>>
    class "Range" as R <<C>>
    class "AGV" as AGVE <<E>>
    class "AGVTask" as AGVT <<E>>
    class "AGVId" as AGVI <<C>>
}

class "BriefDescription" as BD_VO <<value object>> {
    -briefDescription
}
class "Model" as M_VO <<value object>> {
    -model
}
class "AGVPosition" as AGVP_VO <<value object>> {
    -agvPosition
}
class "AGVStatus" as AGVS_VO <<value object>> {
    -taskState
}
class "AGVTask" as AGVT_E <<entity>> {
    -id
    -agvTaskDescription
}
class "AGVId" as AGVI_VO <<value object>> {
    -id
}
class "Range" as R_VO <<value object>> {
    -range
}
class "MaxWeightCapacity" as MWC_VO <<value object>> {
    -maxWeightCapacity
}
class "MaxVolumeCapacity" as MVC_VO <<value object>> {
    -volume
}
class "AGV" as AGV_E <<entity>> <<root>> {
    -state
}
class "OrderItem" as OI_E <<entity>> {
    -itemQuantity
}
class "TotalPriceWithVAT" as TPW_VO <<value object>>
class "DeliveryAddress" as DA_VO <<value object>>
class "BillingAddress" as BA_VO <<value object>>
class "Status" as S_VO <<value object>>
class "TotalVolume" as TV_VO <<value object>>
class "TotalWeight" as TW_VO <<value object>>
class "ProductOrder" as PO_E <<entity>> <<root>> {
    -numericIdentifier
    -dateOfOrder
    -shipmentMethod
    -paymentMethod
}
class "TotalPriceWithoutVAT" as TPWV_VO <<value object>>

AGV_E --> "1" BD_VO : characterized by
AGV_E --> "1" M_VO : has
AGV_E --> "1" AGVP_VO : located in
AGV_E --> "1..*" AGVS_VO : collects

AGV_E --> "1" MVC_VO : respects

PO_E --> "1" DA_VO : associated with
PO_E --> "1" BA_VO : associated with
PO_E --> "1" S_VO : is in

PO_E --> "1" TW_VO : associated with
PO_E --> "1" TPWV_VO : is marked

@enduml
```
